items.html: Moreover, even in every single one of the nine Sefirot of ZA [Zeir Anpin] she has a root. For at the time of the first Ibur [conception] of the correction, she was mingled and incorporated in each and every Sefira in him, and left her root in them all. This is what is written in the Tikkunim, that she is the completion of each and every Sefira; and likewise in Raaya Meheimna, parashat VaYikra, p 17a. Keep all this. Let us return to the matter: before the correction of Zeir Anpin, she was with him in the discernment of an Atara [crown] to the Yesod in him; hence no female and spouse to the male was yet to be found, and her measure, too, was one third the measure of the Yesod, which is the measure of the Atara. Afterwards, the second discernment was at the time of the first Ibur of ZA, as will be written.
